name: ai-team-workflow
description: Codex-first AI Team workflow with global templates, Human Lead profile, production mode, task state, run evidence, repo map, command safety, release gates, and lightweight GitHub gates.

interface.longDescription: AI Team Workflow installs a global Codex standard and clean project template for Human Lead driven product development, production mode routing, task cards, structured task state, compact run evidence, repo maps, natural-language routing, scale-aware quality gates, command safety policy, release gates, and lightweight GitHub PR/CI/security gates.
interface.shortDescription: Codex-first AI team workflow and project template.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up or use the AI Team Workflow for this project.
